subcodes.first_line: O twin pure souls! The All-Knowing God found Iran in darkness and worthy of His favors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو جان پاک ایزد دانا ایران را تاریک یافت و سزاوار الطاف
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @light and darkness
